all.en: This plan defines the preventive maintenance schedule for production line three.
all.zh: 本計畫定義第三條產線的預防性保養排程。

all.en: The objective is to maintain equipment availability above ninety six percent.
all.zh: 目標係維持設備可用率高於百分之九十六。

all.en: Daily checks are performed by the operating crew at the start of each shift.
all.zh: 每班開始時由作業組進行日常檢點。

all.en: Visual inspections cover guards, sensors, and emergency stop buttons.
all.zh: 目視檢查涵蓋護蓋、感測器與緊急停止按鈕。

all.en: Lubrication tasks are scheduled weekly during the planned downtime window.
all.zh: 潤滑作業每週於計畫停機時段執行。

all.en: Filters and screens are cleaned every two weeks regardless of condition.
all.zh: 濾網與篩網無論狀態如何均每兩週清潔一次。

all.en: Monthly tasks include belt tension checks and alignment verification.
all.zh: 月度作業包含皮帶張力檢查與對位確認。

all.en: Vibration analysis on critical motors is conducted every quarter.
all.zh: 關鍵馬達的振動分析每季執行一次。

all.en: Thermal imaging surveys are performed on electrical panels twice a year.
all.zh: 電控盤的熱影像檢測每年執行兩次。

all.en: Major overhauls are planned during the annual factory shutdown in August.
all.zh: 大修排定於八月年度工廠停產期間進行。

all.en: Spare parts inventory is reviewed monthly to maintain optimal levels.
all.zh: 備品庫存每月檢討以維持最適水位。

all.en: Critical spares are stocked locally to minimize repair lead times.
all.zh: 關鍵備品於本地備存以縮短維修前置時間。

all.en: All maintenance work is logged in our computerized maintenance management system.
all.zh: 所有保養工作均登錄於電腦化保養管理系統。

all.en: Work orders must include start time, end time, and parts consumed.
all.zh: 工單須包含開始時間、結束時間與耗用零件。

all.en: Technicians are required to record root causes for every breakdown event.
all.zh: 技師對每起故障事件均須記錄根本原因。

all.en: Mean time between failures is tracked as a key performance indicator.
all.zh: 平均故障間隔時間列為關鍵績效指標進行追蹤。

all.en: Mean time to repair targets are set at under two hours for major faults.
all.zh: 重大故障的平均修復時間目標設定為兩小時以內。

all.en: Training plans ensure each technician is certified on at least three machines.
all.zh: 訓練計畫確保每位技師至少獲得三台機械的認證。

all.en: Safety lockout and tagout procedures must be followed without exception.
all.zh: 安全上鎖與掛牌程序須無例外遵循。

all.en: Contractors performing specialized work must present valid insurance documentation.
all.zh: 執行專業作業的承包商須出示有效保險文件。

all.en: Maintenance budget for this year totals two point three million dollars.
all.zh: 本年度保養預算總計兩百三十萬美元。

all.en: Approximately sixty percent is allocated to preventive activities.
all.zh: 約百分之六十的預算配置於預防性活動。

all.en: The remaining forty percent covers reactive and improvement projects.
all.zh: 其餘百分之四十涵蓋反應性與改善型專案。

all.en: Monthly performance reviews are held with the production leadership team.
all.zh: 每月與生產領導團隊舉行績效檢討會議。

all.en: This plan will be revised should production volumes change significantly.
all.zh: 若生產量出現顯著變動，本計畫將予以修訂。
